name: capegis-ai
description: Custom AI tools for CapeTown GIS Hub - Geospatial automation, FinOps, and Immersive 3D workflows.

BeforeTool.name: terraform-security-guardian
BeforeTool.description: Ensures no hardcoded GCP keys in Terraform and enforces WIF.

BeforeTool.name: out-db-raster-enforcer
BeforeTool.description: Validates out-db raster syntax in ingestion scripts.

BeforePush.name: rls-multi-tenant-verifier
BeforePush.description: Verifies RLS policies for new spatial tables in Supabase migrations.
